title: Significant Problem, Public Value, and Durable Need · Product Reasoning Brief: Value Hypothesis
summary: A novel technical idea lacks evidence of a consequential recurring problem, reachable affected people, existing alternatives, or value beyond demonstration. Predict the decision, affected people, evidence strength, failure cost, and transfer limit before seeing a worked case. Planned artifact: Add and verify the capstone value hypothesis increment in significance and public-value case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence d…
objectives: Connect intervention to behavior and outcome through an explicit causal hypothesis with confounders and falsification evidence.
Study current services, manual workarounds, nonuse, competitors, public infrastructure, and build-nothing options.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# capstone-project cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: capstone-project
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments
evidence:

steps.title: Predict Value Hypothesis · Theory Value Hypothesis
steps.instruction:
theory case — A novel technical demonstration lacks durable need evidence, reachable affected people, current alternatives, or a causal route to public value. The theory variation 6 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Connect intervention to behavior and outcome through an explicit causal hypothesis with confounders and falsification evidence.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Value Hypothesis contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Value Hypothesis · Theory Value Hypothesis.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for connect intervention to behavior and outcome through an explicit causal hypothesis with confounders and falsification evidence. For Predict Value Hypothesis · Theory Value Hypothesis, keep Value Hypothesis connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.text: A novel technical demonstration lacks durable need evidence, reachable affected people, current alternatives, or a causal route to public value. The theory variation 6 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Connect intervention to behavior and outcome through an explicit causal hypothesis with confounders and falsification evidence.

content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Value Hypothesis condition decided your prediction.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: ACM Code of Ethics and Professional Conduct — Controls public-good reasoning, harm avoidance, honesty, fairness, privacy, security, competence, review, and accountability.

hints: For Predict Value Hypothesis · Theory Value Hypothesis, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Value Hypothesis precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Predict Value Hypothesis · Theory Value Hypothesis, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A novel technical demonstration lacks durable need evidence, reachable affected people, current alternatives, or a causal route to public value. The theory variation 6 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Connect intervention to behavior and outcome through an explicit causal hypothesis with confounders and falsification evidence.
For Predict Value Hypothesis · Theory Value Hypothesis, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Improved product metrics prove public benefit.

options.text: Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
Connect intervention to behavior and outcome through an explicit causal hypothesis with confounders and falsification evidence. Apply it to the concrete input and state the observable result.
Improved product metrics prove public benefit. That claim does not survive the predict value hypothesis evidence boundary.

steps.title: Bound Value Hypothesis · Theory Value Hypothesis
steps.instruction:
theory case — A novel technical demonstration lacks durable need evidence, reachable affected people, current alternatives, or a causal route to public value. The theory variation 2 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Connect intervention to behavior and outcome through an explicit causal hypothesis with confounders and falsification evidence.

After tracing the worked code, choose the Value Hypothesis application whose preconditions and limits still match the supplied case.

Evidence target: Bound Value Hypothesis · Theory Value Hypothesis.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for connect intervention to behavior and outcome through an explicit causal hypothesis with confounders and falsification evidence. For Bound Value Hypothesis · Theory Value Hypothesis, keep Value Hypothesis connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.text: Connect intervention to behavior and outcome through an explicit causal hypothesis with confounders and falsification evidence. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name the stakeholder decision, affected people, authority, assumption, revision, artifact, observable behavior, changed case, rejected failure, accessibility, security, privacy, operation, recovery, contribution, residual risk, and transfer limit; then calibrate the public claim to that exact evidence.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A novel technical demonstration lacks durable need evidence, reachable affected people, current alternatives, or a causal route to public value. The worked example variation 6 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Connect intervention to behavior and outcome through an explicit causal hypothesis with confounders and falsification evidence. A defensible solution applies Value Hypothesis, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to significance and public-value case.

content.code:
workspace: portfolio
project-id: changed-product-4
stakeholder: affected-user review panel
decision: continue only if the changed task meets its outcome and guardrails
artifact: revision-bound evidence packet
claim: one bounded behavior survives the changed context
verify: reproduce the task, inspect the artifact, and compare the predeclared measure
changed-case: different access need, input, constraint, and dependency failure
failure: reject plausible output without causal, human, recovery, or ownership evidence
repair: isolate the first unsupported transition, correct it, and add a regression
owner: named learner and stakeholder reviewer
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research and release environment
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: Improved product metrics prove public benefit. This fails the Value Hypothesis contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.label: Research anchor
content.value: ACM Code of Ethics and Professional Conduct (ACM Code 2018 current) — Controls public-good reasoning, harm avoidance, honesty, fairness, privacy, security, competence, review, and accountability.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Connect intervention to behavior and outcome through an explicit causal hypothesis with confounders and falsification evidence.

options.text: Reconstruct the conditions for Value Hypothesis, gather a counterexample, repair the artifact, and add a regression case.
Keep the artifact unchanged and rewrite the explanation so the current output appears intentional. That claim does not survive the repair the value hypothesis defect evidence boundary.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.

steps.title: Defend the Value Hypothesis model · Theory Value Hypothesis
steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Value Hypothesis: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A novel technical demonstration lacks durable need evidence, reachable affected people, current alternatives, or a causal route to public value. The theory variation 2 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Connect intervention to behavior and outcome through an explicit causal hypothesis with confounders and falsification evidence.

For Defend the Value Hypothesis model · Theory Value Hypothesis, keep Value Hypothesis connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Connect intervention to behavior and outcome through an explicit causal hypothesis with confounders and falsification evidence.
